meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap and accelerate your SaaS product launch today.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders solve this by turning complex technical debt into high-value case studies. By leveraging AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code, you can rapidly resolve architectural blockers, demonstrate technical mastery, and ship a revenue-generating MVP that proves your worth to prospective investors.
content.intro:
You’re staring at an empty GitHub profile, the clock is ticking on your runway, and the pressure to ship a professional-grade MVP is mounting. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about the utility of the product you deploy. The 'no portfolio' narrative is a psychological barrier that prevents talented builders from shipping real-world value.

Modern engineering isn't about writing every line of code from scratch; it’s about architecting solutions and debugging with surgical precision. By integrating AI agents into your development lifecycle, you can bypass the tedious trial-and-error phase, turning complex bugs into documented success stories that serve as the ultimate proof of your engineering capabilities.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Identify the primary technical bottleneck preventing your MVP from functioning. Use AI to map out your current codebase structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current repository structure and identify the top three high-risk architectural debt items that are preventing MVP deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project architecture and list critical blockers'

steps.title: Automated Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use AI to trace the root cause of failures without manually stepping through lines of code, saving hours of investigation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a recursive trace on the failed auth module. Isolate the specific line of code causing the 500 error and explain the logic flaw.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'debug authentication service and identify the root cause of the crash'

steps.title: Refactor for Performance
steps.description: Optimize your code for production-readiness. AI can suggest O(n) improvements that make your product feel enterprise-grade.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the database query layer to reduce latency. Suggest an indexing strategy and implement a caching mechanism.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor database queries for performance optimization'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Generate high-coverage unit tests to ensure that every feature you fix stays fixed, providing a professional safety net.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the payment integration. Include edge cases for failed transactions and webhooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for payment processing module'

steps.title: Documentation as Portfolio
steps.description: Automatically generate technical documentation based on your fixes, transforming your debugging process into a public showcase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the technical challenges solved in this session into a professional blog post and README update for my repository.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate professional technical documentation of the recent fixes'

pro_tips: Treat your bug reports as public documentation; a detailed fix is more impressive to investors than a green checkmark on a tutorial project.
Use Claude Code to enforce strict type checking across your entire stack to minimize runtime errors before they reach production.
Never accept the first AI suggestion; ask it to provide three alternative implementations to demonstrate you understand the architectural trade-offs.
Always commit your AI-assisted fixes with descriptive messages that explain the 'why' behind the change, not just the 'what'.
Automate your feedback loop by integrating AI-generated test reports into your CI/CD pipeline to ensure zero-regression deployments.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is stable and your repository is documented, shift your focus to user acquisition and tracking telemetry to prove your product's market fit.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the lack of a traditional background keep you from launching your next venture. Leverage the power of AI to out-engineer the competition and build a portfolio that speaks for itself. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
